return(function(y,X,S,R,h,P,Q,j,s,N,T,u,i,a,o,z,D,G,c,n,t,p,E,F)i,N,a,E,F,u,o,j,t,c,G,n,p,D,z,s,T=function(y,U)local X=a(U)local S=function(...)return N(y,{...},U,X)end return S
